name: Francophone Narrator
voice_prompt: A person in their forties with a smooth, melodic voice carrying subtle French influence even in English. Gender-neutral presentation. Speaks both French and English with native fluency. Pacing is unhurried, almost sensual. Voice has natural elegance without affectation.
character_context: Bilingual narrator for French-English content. Handles code-switching naturally. Brings European literary sensibility to narration.

product.tagline: Where French elegance meets English clarity

notes: First European language expansion. Opens French market.
